channel.title: Layth Ayache - Blog
channel.description: AI systems architecture, infrastructure engineering, and production deployment insights from Lebanon.

item.title: Real-Time Video Anonymization at 30 FPS on a $35 Computer
item.description: How I built PrivacyGuard — a zero-cloud, GDPR-compliant video de-identification pipeline running on Raspberry Pi 4 using YOLOv8-nano and ONNX Runtime.

item.title: Building in a Country with No Infrastructure
item.description: How infrastructure fragility becomes an engineering variable when production systems cannot assume perfect conditions.

item.title: Designing AI Systems for Unstable Networks
item.description: Practical patterns for keeping AI products usable when connectivity and latency are unreliable.

item.title: Lessons from Telecom Engineering to AI Systems
item.description: Working on telecom infrastructure changed how I approach reliability, monitoring, and risk in AI products.
